mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ops_delivery_plan_result( order_id, order_item, do_id, expect_delivery_day, plan_delivery_day, event_source, version, current_valid, delflag, cre_time, creator, remark, ex_relation, current_cycle, current_cycle_point, reliability ) values
( #{item.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expectDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.planDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.currentValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.currentCyclePoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reliability,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
